name: openwork
description: OpenWork desktop and headless agent workspace from Model Studio AI

scripts.test: bun test && for f in $(find . -name '*.isolated.ts' -not -path './node_modules/*'); do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck:all: cd packages/core && bun run tsc --noEmit && cd ../shared && bun run tsc --noEmit && cd ../server-core && bun run tsc --noEmit && cd ../server && bun run tsc --noEmit && cd ../session-tools-core && bun run tsc --noEmit && cd ../../apps/electron && bun run typecheck && cd ../../packages/ui && bun run tsc --noEmit
scripts.test:shared:all: bun run test:shared:models && bun run test:shared:config
scripts.validate:dev: bun run typecheck:all && bun run test:shared:all && bun run test:doc-tools
scripts.validate:ci: bun run validate:dev && bun run lint:i18n:parity
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ipc-sends && bun run lint:electron && bun run lint:shared && bun run lint:ui
scripts.electron:build: bun run electron:build:main && bun run electron:build:preload && bun run electron:build:renderer && bun run electron:build:resources && bun run electron:build:assets
scripts.electron:dev:logs: pgrep -f 'tail -f.*@craft-agent/electron/main.log' > /dev/null || osascript -e "tell application \"Terminal\" to do script \"$PWD/scripts/tail-electron-logs.sh\""
scripts.electron:dist: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml
scripts.electron:dist:mac: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --mac
scripts.electron:dist:win: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --win
scripts.electron:dist:linux: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --linux
scripts.electron:dist:mac:no-publish: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --mac --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:win:no-publish: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --win --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:linux:no-publish: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --linux --publish never
scripts.electron:dist:dev:mac: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false CRAFT_DEV_RUNTIME=1 bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --mac
scripts.electron:dist:dev:win: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && CRAFT_DEV_RUNTIME=1 bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --win
scripts.electron:dist:dev:linux: bun run electron:vendor:turbospark && CRAFT_DEV_RUNTIME=1 bun run electron:build && bun run electron:builder-config && cd apps/electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.generated.yml --linux
scripts.playground:dev: bun run scripts/dev-vite.ts --config apps/electron/vite.config.ts --default-port 5173 --port-env CRAFT_VITE_PORT --label playground --open /playground.html
scripts.viewer:dev: bun run scripts/dev-vite.ts --config apps/viewer/vite.config.ts --default-port 5174 --port-env CRAFT_VIEWER_PORT --label viewer --open /s/tz5-13I84pwK_he
scripts.webui:dev: bun run scripts/dev-vite.ts --config apps/webui/vite.config.ts --default-port 5175 --port-env CRAFT_WEBUI_DEV_PORT --label webui
scripts.server:prod: bun run server:build:subprocess && bun run webui:build && CRAFT_WEBUI_DIR=apps/webui/dist CRAFT_BUNDLED_ASSETS_ROOT=$PWD/apps/electron bun run packages/server/src/index.ts
scripts.server:dev:webui: bun run webui:build && CRAFT_WEBUI_DIR=apps/webui/dist CRAFT_WEBUI_PORT=3100 bun run scripts/dev-server.ts
scripts.docs:dev: cd apps/online-docs && npm install && npx mintlify dev
